commands.command: route smoke with mocked Mini App API
shell status smoke with mocked Mini App API
commands.notes: Overview AppShell shows RTX-PC, 2 active sessions and 1 approval. New task AppShell shows project and active counters.

commands.command: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.example.yml -f infra/docker-compose.codex-desktop.yml up -d --build miniapp
commands.notes: happytg-miniapp-1 recreated and healthy on host port 3008.
Local 127.0.0.1:3008 serves redesigned HTML. Public URL returned redesigned HTML via PowerShell but in-app Browser reported ERR_CERT_COMMON_NAME_INVALID.

notes: Temporary visual server was stopped after screenshot and smoke verification.
AppShell status strip receives data-backed shellStatus from route projections.
Running Docker Mini App image was rebuilt after the source change.
